title: Division
description: A DDC line of business that delivers capital projects — the organizational lens over the project portfolio. DDC has no dedicated division dataset; this reference entity is derived from the 'Division' column carried on every Active Projects row (3ss8-m844, rukc-mmqu, g9ub-hrve) and DDC's own org structure (Infrastructure, Public Buildings, and program-management/support units). Useful for rolling project counts and dollar totals up by portfolio.

activeProjectCount.description: Derived count of active projects in this division.
